title: add_file
description: Add a port-local file (kind=resource, supplies content) or stage a file from the dragonfly source tree (kind=materialize, supplies source path).

dest.description: Relpath under ports/<origin>/ where the file lands

source.description: Source path in the dragonfly tree. Required iff kind=materialize.

scope.description: Target build line for this op. '@any' (default) applies universally on every build. '@current' resolves to the env's current target at apply time — use for build-line-specific fixes. Never type literal '@2026Q2'; the runner injects t.target.
